description: Claude Code 内置汉化规则

translations.chinese: 聚焦或取消聚焦 Claude 窗口

translations.original: Tired of repeating yourself? Tell Claude to remember what you’ve told it using CLAUDE.md.
translations.chinese: 无需重复指令。通过 CLAUDE.md 记录已知信息，让 Claude 拥有持久记忆。
"别写烂代码了，写点能跑上线的吧。"

translations.original: "Type /model to pick the right tool for the job."
translations.chinese: "输入 /model 为当前任务选择合适的工具。"

translations.original: "Use planning mode to talk through big changes before a commit. Press"
translations.chinese: "在提交代码前，使用计划模式讨论重大变更。按下"

translations.original: "Make a CLAUDE.md file for instructions Claude will read every single time."
translations.chinese: "创建一个 CLAUDE.md 文件，用于存放 Claude 每次都会读取的指令。"

translations.original: "You’ve come to the absolutely right place!"

translations.chinese: "打开 Claude Code 扩展配置"

translations.original: "Open a new Claude instance in the Terminal"
translations.chinese: "在终端中开启新的 Claude 实例"
以聚焦或取消聚焦 Claude 窗口

translations.original: "After installing plugins, reload this extension to use them here."
translations.chinese: "安装插件后，请重新加载扩展以在此使用。"

translations.original: "Continue in Terminal to change output style?"
"After changing your output style in Terminal and reloading this extension, you'll be able to use it here."
translations.chinese: "在终端修改输出样式并重载扩展后，即可在此生效。"

translations.original: "Once agents are configured in Terminal, you can reload this extension and ask Claude to use them here."
translations.chinese: "在终端配置完成后，重载扩展即可在此调用智能体。"

translations.original: "Once hooks are configured in this repository, they'll be active in your IDE, too."
translations.chinese: "在此仓库配置 Hooks 后，它们也会在 IDE 中生效。"

translations.original: "Once configured, memories will be picked up by Claude Code here in your IDE."
translations.chinese: "配置完成后，Claude Code 将在 IDE 中同步你的记忆内容。"

translations.original: "Permission settings are shared between Terminal and this IDE."
translations.chinese: "权限设置在终端与 IDE 之间共享。"
"没有运行中的 MCP 服务器。"

translations.original: "Report model issues to the research team"
"No marketplaces configured. Add one above to discover plugins."
translations.chinese: "尚未配置市场。请在上方添加一个市场以探索插件。"

translations.original: "Use Claude Code in the terminal to configure MCP servers. They’ll work here, too!"
translations.chinese: "在终端中使用 Claude Code 配置 MCP 服务器，设置也会在此处生效！"

translations.original: Claude is requesting permission to use
translations.chinese: Claude 正在请求使用权限

translations.original: "Claude will edit your selected text or the whole file. Click, or press Shift+Tab, to switch modes."
translations.chinese: "Claude 将编辑选中的文本或整个文件。点击或按 Shift+Tab 切换模式。"

translations.original: "Claude will explore the code and present a plan before editing. Click, or press Shift+Tab, to switch modes."
translations.chinese: "Claude 将探索代码并在编辑前提供方案。点击或按 Shift+Tab 切换模式。"

translations.original: "Claude Code will not ask for your approval before running potentially dangerous commands."
translations.chinese: "Claude Code 在执行潜在危险命令前将不再请求您的批准。"

translations.original: "Claude will ask before each edit. Click, or press Shift+Tab, to switch modes."
translations.chinese: "Claude 将在每次编辑前进行询问。点击或按 Shift+Tab 切换模式。"

translations.original: Not showing Claude your current file selection
translations.chinese: 不向 Claude 显示当前选中的文件

translations.original: Showing Claude your current file selection
translations.chinese: 正在向 Claude 显示当前选中的文件
"是否在终端中继续管理 MCP？"

translations.original: " command-line tool to configure system-wide or private servers."
translations.chinese: " 命令行工具，来配置系统级或私有服务器。"

translations.original: "Once configured, MCPs will be reflected in your IDE, too."
translations.chinese: "配置完成后，MCP 也会在您的 IDE 中生效。"

translations.original: "Claude Code can be used with your Claude subscription or billed based on API usage through your Console account."
translations.chinese: "Claude Code 可以关联您的 Claude 订阅使用，也可以通过 Console 账户按 API 使用量计费。"

translations.original: "How do you want to log in?"
"Use your Claude Pro, Team, or Enterprise subscription"
translations.chinese: "使用您的 Claude Pro、Team 或 Enterprise 订阅"

translations.original: "Pay for API usage through your Console account"
translations.chinese: "通过您的 Console 账户按 API 使用量付费"

translations.original: "Instructions on how to use API keys or third-party providers."
translations.chinese: "关于如何使用 API 密钥或第三方服务商的说明。"

translations.original: "No plugins available. Add a marketplace to discover plugins."
translations.chinese: "没有可用的插件。请添加市场以发现更多插件。"

translations.original: "Disable plugin (stays installed but will not load)"
translations.chinese: "禁用插件（仍会安装但不会加载）"

translations.original: "Make sure you trust a plugin before installing, updating, or using it. Anthropic does not control what MCP servers, files, or other software are included in plugins and cannot verify that they will work as intended or that they won't change."
translations.chinese: "在安装、更新或使用插件之前，请确保您信任该插件。Anthropic 不控制插件中包含的 MCP 服务器、文件或其他软件，也无法验证它们是否按预期工作或是否会改变。"

translations.original: "Only for you, only in this repo"

translations.chinese: "重启 Claude 以应用插件更改"

translations.original: "A new forked conversation will be created after rewinding."
translations.chinese: "回滚后将创建一个新的复刻对话。"

translations.original: "Rewinding does not affect files edited manually or via bash."
translations.chinese: "回滚不会影响手动编辑或通过 bash 编辑的文件。"

translations.original: "Failed to rewind code: No file checkpoint found"
translations.chinese: "回滚代码失败：未找到文件检查点"

translations.original: "Failed to fork conversation: Unknown session id"
translations.chinese: "复刻对话失败：未知会话 ID"

translations.original: "\u201D requires adding a new marketplace source: "
"No plugins available. Add a marketplace to discover plugins."
translations.chinese: "没有可用插件。请添加市场源以发现插件。"

translations.original: "What to do first? Ask about this codebase or we can start writing code."
translations.chinese: "接下来做什么？您可以先询问关于此代码库的问题，或者我们直接开始编写代码。"
"是的，允许本次会话中的所有编辑"
"是的，允许访问 ",$1," 个目录，用于 ",$2
"改为告诉 Claude 该做什么"

translations.original: "Toggle fast mode for faster responses (Opus 4.6 only)"
translations.chinese: "开启快速模式以获得更快的响应 (仅限 Opus 4.6)"

translations.original: "Claude will ask for approval before making each edit"
translations.chinese: "Claude 在进行每项编辑前都会要求手动审核"

translations.original: . Click to change, or press Shift+Tab to cycle.
translations.chinese: 。点击修改，或按 Shift+Tab 循环切换。

translations.original: "Claude will edit your selected text or the whole file"
translations.chinese: "Claude 将编辑您选中的文本或整个文件"

translations.original: "Claude will explore the code and present a plan before editing"
translations.chinese: "Claude 将先探索代码并在编辑前出具方案"

translations.original: "Add files or folders to the conversation"
translations.chinese: "向上下文中添加文件或文件夹"

translations.original: "Click a position to set effort level"
"Upload a file to include in conversation"
translations.chinese: "上传文件并将其加入当前上下文"

translations.original: "Restore code and conversation to an earlier point"
translations.chinese: "将代码与会话恢复至历史节点"
"配置 MCP (模型上下文协议) 服务端"

translations.original: "Review the plan above and decide whether to proceed"
translations.chinese: "请审核以上计划并决定是否继续"
"本会话中 Claude 表现如何？"

translations.original: "How can I do better? We would love to hear your feedback!"
translations.chinese: "怎样做得更好？期待听到您的反馈！"

translations.original: "Thank you very much for the feedback!"

translations.chinese: "了解我们如何使用您的反馈"

translations.original: "Select a message to restore code and fork the conversation from that point."
translations.chinese: "选择一条消息以恢复代码并从该点复刻对话。"

translations.original: "A new Git worktree will be created in a sibling directory"
translations.chinese: "将在同级目录中创建新的 Git 工作树"

translations.original: "Click or drag to set effort level"
translations.chinese: "点击或拖拽以设置投入等级"
"使用计划模式处理复杂更改"

translations.original: "Write a test for a recent change"
"Explore the codebase and suggest a change"
translations.chinese: "探索代码库并提出修改建议"
"添加浏览器标签页到对话中"

translations.original: "Can you refactor this into smaller pieces?"
translations.chinese: "能将其重构为更小的模块吗？"

translations.original: "Explore this codebase and document it in CLAUDE.md"
translations.chinese: "探索此代码库并在 CLAUDE.md 中记录"

translations.original: "In CLAUDE.md, remember that I always prefer..."
translations.chinese: "在 CLAUDE.md 中，记住我更喜欢..."
"允许与此主机建立网络连接？"

translations.original: "Toggle fast mode for faster responses (Opus only)"
translations.chinese: "切换快速模式以获得更快响应（仅限 Opus）"

translations.original: "Open a new conversation in a new tab"
"Claude may use instructions, code, or files from this skill."
translations.chinese: "Claude 可能会使用此技能中的指令、代码或文件。"
"技能、子智能体、插件和 MCP 服务器"

translations.original: "Claude will automatically choose the best permission mode for each task"
translations.chinese: "Claude 将为每个任务自动选择最佳权限模式"

translations.original: "In Ask before editing mode, Claude will never change files without approval."
translations.chinese: "在修改前询问模式下，Claude 未经批准绝不会修改文件。"

translations.original: "Our newest model for complex, long-running work. Switch anytime with /model."
translations.chinese: "我们最新的模型，适用于复杂、长期运行的任务。随时使用 /model 切换。"

translations.original: "Claude will not ask for approval before running potentially dangerous commands"
translations.chinese: "Claude 在执行潜在危险命令前不会请求批准"

translations.original: "Fable 5 was included in your plan for a limited time, and now requires usage credits."
translations.chinese: "Fable 5 曾在限时内包含在您的计划中，现在需要使用额度。"

translations.original: "After making changes, exit Claude in Terminal, and reload the IDE extension to use them here."
translations.chinese: "在终端中做出更改后，退出 Claude 并重新加载 IDE 扩展即可在此生效。"

translations.original: "Output style is set via /config. After changing it in Terminal and reloading this extension, you'll be able to use it here."
translations.chinese: "输出样式通过 /config 设置。在终端中更改并重载此扩展后，即可在此使用。"

translations.original: "Claude knows which file you're viewing in VS Code, and can see what's selected. Highlight code in the editor, then prompt Claude to edit it."
translations.chinese: "Claude 知道您在 VS Code 中查看的文件，并能看到选中内容。在编辑器中高亮代码，然后提示 Claude 进行编辑。"

translations.original: "Press Shift-Tab twice, or click the mode picker twice, to cycle into Plan Mode. This forces Claude to write a detailed plan before it can edit any code."
translations.chinese: "按两次 Shift-Tab，或点击两次模式选择器，切换到计划模式。这将强制 Claude 在编辑任何代码之前编写详细的计划。"

translations.original: "By default, Claude asks you before editing a file. Press Shift-Tab or click the mode picker to switch to Auto-Accept mode. Then, send a prompt and watch Claude edit without stopping!"
translations.chinese: "默认情况下，Claude 在编辑文件前会询问您。按 Shift-Tab 或点击模式选择器可切换至自动接受模式。然后发送提示，看着 Claude 不停编辑！"

translations.original: "Create a CLAUDE.md file and add permanent instructions for Claude. Every time you prompt Claude, it'll receive these instructions. Include rules for how to interact, coding norms, and details about your project."
translations.chinese: "创建 CLAUDE.md 文件并添加永久性指令。每次向 Claude 发出提示时，它都会收到这些指令。包括交互规则、编码规范和项目详情。"

translations.original: "This session was started on a different branch. Switch to continue with the original context."
translations.chinese: "此会话在另一个分支上启动。切换以使用原始上下文继续。"

translations.original: "If the browser didn't open, visit this URL:"
translations.chinese: "如果浏览器未打开，请访问此 URL："

translations.original: "If the redirect page shows a connection error, paste the URL from your browser's address bar:"
translations.chinese: "如果重定向页面显示连接错误，请粘贴浏览器地址栏中的 URL："

translations.original: "Auto mode lets Claude handle permission prompts automatically. Claude checks each tool call for risky actions and prompt injection before executing, runs the ones it assesses as lower-risk, and blocks the rest."
translations.chinese: "自动模式让 Claude 自动处理权限提示。Claude 在执行前检查每个工具调用的风险操作和提示注入，执行其评估为低风险的操作，并阻止其余操作。"

translations.original: "Approximate, based on local sessions on this machine — does not include other devices or claude.ai"
translations.chinese: "基于本机本地会话的近似值 — 不包括其他设备或 claude.ai"

translations.original: "View and control this session from claude.ai/code"
translations.chinese: "从 claude.ai/code 查看和控制此会话"
